## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link an issue if there is one. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature/page
- [ ] Content-only change (copy, `/now`, `/uses`, TIL, case studies)
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] CI/CD or docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx eslint src --ext .js --max-warnings=0` passes
- [ ] `npm test -- --watchAll=false` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Verified in the browser (screenshot below if it's a visual change)

## Screenshots (if UI change)
